visible_observations: A pale adult woman crouches in a compressed forward diagonal beneath a large black spiked restraint structure that crosses behind and above her shoulders.
The outer read is governed by the long pointed restraint bar, bent legs, forward-reaching clawed hand, tilted head, and the dark foreground body beneath her.
Her face combines a strong head tilt, wide luminous eyes, raised and pinched brows, and an open sharp-toothed grin.
The palette separates pale skin and hair from black leather and metal, with magenta light along the face, hair, and restraint and cyan light through the environment.
Hard glossy restraint and leather surfaces, soft skin and hair, translucent magical light, foreground occlusion, and misty architectural depth are distinctly rendered.
The face occupies a small portion of the wide composition; the restraint bar, pale bent legs, hair halo, and magenta-cyan value pattern carry the largest source-scale signals.
surface_style_craft_characteristics: The master is staged as a close cinematic action event rather than a neutral isolated full-body presentation.
Silhouette information is highly asymmetrical and pose-dependent, with the restraint device supplying the broadest horizontal mass.
Facial psychology is encoded through simultaneous pleasure, agitation, and predatory teeth rather than a neutral beauty pose.
The image uses selective sharpness, strong rim light, and atmospheric depth to concentrate detail around the head, restraint, and forward limbs.
uncertainties: No native 96-pixel derivative or isolated transparent character asset is included in this benchmark file.
The cinematic foreground figure and environment contribute to the composition and cannot be separated from the character read in this image.

visible_observations: A towering nonhuman figure fills the frame from a low viewing angle, with a small human figure near the lower edge establishing the creature's scale.
The silhouette spreads laterally through enormous manta-like wings or fins while the central torso narrows into a pale ribbed breastplate and dark pointed shoulder structures.
A small humanoid mask-like head sits high above the torso, with a rigid mouth, recessed features, and glowing magenta eyes.
The palette is tightly controlled around black-violet, purple, magenta, and ivory; pale thorax plates and magenta nodes form the highest-contrast internal anchors.
Curved organic membranes, glossy chitin-like armor, bone-colored plates, suspended particles, and atmospheric violet light are separated by edge quality and reflected color.
The outer wing mass and pale central thorax occupy far more image area than the face or small ornamental nodes.
surface_style_craft_characteristics: The master design combines a humanoid facial decoy with a much larger animal-like body plan.
Silhouette language is dominated by a broad wing span, crescent cutouts, hooked tips, and a narrow central vertical axis.
Facial affect is minimal and remote; threatening intent is carried primarily by scale, viewpoint, anatomy, and luminous eyes.
The composition preserves a clear central value hierarchy despite dense environmental and particle effects.
uncertainties: No native 96-pixel derivative or isolated transparent character asset is included in this benchmark file.
The wing extremities merge with the dark environment in places, so their complete isolated contour is not visible.

visible_observations: A silver-haired adult woman is suspended in a long horizontal action pose, with her head and torso projecting rightward and both mechanical blade legs trailing leftward.
The silhouette is organized by an extended rear arm, taut cables, two elongated blade legs, swept coat panels, and a forward-pointing profile.
Her face is shown in clean profile with a lowered brow, closed mouth, narrowed forward gaze, and little extraneous expression.
Black and blue-gray garments and mechanical limbs are edged with restrained gold trim, while cyan modules and cable energy provide small high-chroma focal points.
Hair, cloth, polished metal, matte black panels, gold edging, and blue energy are differentiated through distinct highlight width, edge sharpness, and surface reflection.
The bright hair and face form a compact focal wedge, while the long dark blade legs and arm-cable line carry the largest directional shapes.
surface_style_craft_characteristics: The character concept integrates equipment and anatomy by replacing the lower legs with long angular blades.
Silhouette clarity comes from a single strong travel direction and long separated appendage lines rather than a standing body envelope.
Facial psychology is restrained and task-focused, with the body line and mechanical action supplying most of the force.
The environment is softened and desaturated behind crisp character edges, preserving the head, torso, cables, and blades as the sharpest structures.
uncertainties: No native 96-pixel derivative or isolated transparent character asset is included in this benchmark file.
The full blade-leg geometry is partly staged against architecture and motion, so the splash is not a neutral turnaround.

visible_observations: A full-body adult woman stands near-frontally in a long black coat, fitted corset, trousers, gloves, and high-heeled boots, holding a large feather quill in one hand and an open parchment scroll in the other.
The silhouette widens through pointed shoulders, long ragged coat tails, many curling parchment ribbons, the quill, and branching black ink forms.
Her face uses a direct unsmiling gaze, lowered brows, dark lips, fine line markings, and asymmetrical black-and-silver hair crossing one side of the face.
The dominant materials are dry worn black leather or cloth, tan fibrous parchment, red wax seals, dark metal, black liquid or smoke, and small pale-blue sigils.
Bronze-gold seam and occult linework covers large garment areas, while frayed hems, script, hair strands, seal impressions, and ink splashes create dense small-scale texture.

Large pale parchment arcs, the face, the feather quill, the shoulder points, and the triangular coat envelope remain the broadest value and contour structures; much of the garment symbolism is substantially finer.
surface_style_craft_characteristics: The concept uses a mostly upright centered body as a stable core and places animated paper and ink asymmetrically around it.
Silhouette variation is generated by external prop ribbons and ragged cloth edges more than by a nonhuman body plan.
Facial psychology is controlled and severe, carried by a direct gaze, compressed mouth, brow angle, and marked skin.
The rendering is line-dense and dry, with repeated etched ornament, abrasion, stitching, script, and fibrous edges rather than broad glossy gradients.
uncertainties: No native 96-pixel derivative is included; dense garment linework and script cannot be directly assessed at that target size from this file alone.
The saturated orange field is a presentation or keying background rather than an illustrated environment or transparent channel.

records.artifact_class: User-approved isolated adult female villain master
visible_observations: A full-body adult woman stands in a rear three-quarter pose with her head turned back toward the viewer, one arm hanging beside a long serrated sword.
The principal silhouette is a tall fitted human figure split by a ragged cape and skull pauldron on the left and a long bone-edged blade on the right.
Her face uses a sidelong narrowed gaze, slightly parted dark lips, a raised chin, wet strands of dark hair, and visible scars or blood marks.
The costume is dominated by fitted worn black leather: corset lacing, strapped trousers, long gloves, high-heeled boots, belts, buckles, and fine contrasting stitches.
Pale scarred skin, a bone-like skull shoulder piece, a dark frayed cape, aged metal hardware, dried red marks, and the serrated blade are separated through dry texture and narrow highlights.
At the source scale, the cape edge, skull shoulder, turned pale face and back, long legs, and blade are the major contour or value anchors; stitching, scratches, and small blood marks are much finer.
surface_style_craft_characteristics: The master uses a controlled rear-view pose to expose the laced costume structure while keeping the face engaged through the over-shoulder turn.
Silhouette identity is concentrated in the counterbalanced cape-and-skull mass and long serrated sword around an otherwise narrow upright body.
Facial psychology is conveyed through sidelong eye contact, chin angle, parted lips, surface damage, and the guarded body turn.
The rendering emphasizes dry worn leather, accumulated abrasion, stitching, scars, bone ridges, and restrained metallic reflection.
uncertainties: No native 96-pixel derivative is included; the survival of fine stitching, scars, and leather wear at that target size cannot be directly inspected here.
The saturated orange field is a presentation or keying background rather than an illustrated environment or transparent channel.
